payload.title: Staff Summary - 2024 TBTA Operating Surplus
payload.content_type: staff summary with attached agreed-upon procedures report
payload.publisher: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority (MTA Bridges and Tunnels)
payload.description: MTA Board staff summary and Deloitte & Touche agreed-upon procedures report for TBTA's 2024 operating surplus calculation and transfer

tool_args.label: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority (TBTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The legal name of MTA Bridges and Tunnels is Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority.

payload.description: The legal name of MTA Bridges and Tunnels; a component unit of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority; operationally and legally independent of the MTA

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority... is a component unit of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority.

payload.description: Component unit of the State of New York; parent entity of TBTA

tool_args.label: TBTA Operating Surplus Distribution Rules
tool_args.raw_text: The initial $24 million in operating surplus is provided to Transit and the balance is divided equally between Transit and the MTA.

payload.claim_text: The initial $24 million in operating surplus is provided to Transit and the balance is divided equally between Transit and the MTA
payload.description: Operating surplus distribution rules per Title 9 Section 1219-a (2)(d) of the New York Public Authorities Law

payload.description: CBD Tolling activities are excluded from the operating surplus schedule and related revenue/expense comparisons
